core_payload.content:
# Symphony Run Attempt

## 1. Role
Symphony Run Attempt will become the durable assignment-bearing execution record for repository work, packaging the live session, its artifacts, and its branch consequences into one accountable object.

## 2. Future Attempt Contract
Attempt records will carry clearer assignment handles, return paths, artifact bundles, branch-aware outcome linkage, and a stronger distinction between the durable attempt object and the live session nested inside it.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Repository work will remain reviewable and attributable even as it becomes more asynchronous, more persistent, and more tightly coupled to downstream review and promotion lanes.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Symphony Run Attempt supports To Dig Deep by making each execution pass durable enough to inspect, compare, and govern.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Run Attempt defines the future durable execution record for repository work: assignment handles, richer artifact bundles, clearer branch linkage, and stronger distinction between a live session and the durable attempt object that contains it.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
